raw_consumer_statement:
I have a digital subscription to the XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
For the last few years it has been billed directly to my American Express credit card. And I continue to be billed by American Express for this digital subscription In XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, I started submitting payments to XXXX for the XXXX XXXX XXXX. I do not recall the circumstances of this. I suspect it occurred when automatic credit card billing was interrupted by a credit card change. Probably necessitated by a lost credit card. I just recently became aware that I was paying twice for the same digital subscription. I have canceled my subscription through XXXX, effective XX/XX/XXXX. 

So I have submitted XXXX payments to the XXXX XXXX XXXX every month, 1 through XXXX, and 1 through American Express, every month since XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX. 

When I became aware of this double billing, for which I bear some responsibility, I contacted the XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX and American Express. I explained the situation to all 3 parties, in detail. Their chatbots were of no help. Their human representatives were not helpful. I felt that I should receive at least a partial refund. I have over paid XXXX dollars a month for 30 months. At least XXXX dollars. Twice the usual amount.
